symptom: Low power, P0401 or P0402 active
repair_procedure: Run actuator sweep, inspect cooler restriction, inspect wiring, replace valve only after test failure
document_text: For EGR flow related complaints, technician must capture DTC, actuator response, cooler inspection result, and before/after road test notes.

repair_procedure: Check charge air cooler leaks, inspect actuator calibration, verify oil contamination, then replace turbo if failed
document_text: Underboost does not always mean turbo failure. Check boost leaks and actuator position sensor before part replacement.

repair_procedure: Inspect connector, run SCR efficiency test, verify DEF quality, replace sensor if response test fails
document_text: NOx sensor replacement requires evidence of signal response failure and SCR test result.

repair_procedure: Inspect crystallization, pressure test DEF pump, clean lines, replace doser if spray pattern fails
document_text: DEF doser claims require photo evidence of crystallization and dosing command test result.

repair_procedure: Check differential pressure, ash counter, regeneration history, and upstream issues before DPF replacement
document_text: DPF replacement requires evidence that upstream fuel, EGR, turbo, and sensor issues are not primary cause.

repair_procedure: Pressure test cooling system, inspect pump weep hole, verify belt and pulley condition
document_text: Coolant pump leakage claims require photo of leak path and pressure test result.

repair_procedure: Inspect axle vent, hub surface, installation marks, and seal lip damage
document_text: Wheel seal repeat claims require installation evidence and axle vent inspection result.
